name: Salicylic Acid
description: A beta-hydroxy acid (BHA) that exfoliates deep within the pores.
scientificSummary: Being oil-soluble, it penetrates lipid layers to dissolve sebum and dead skin cells inside pores.
mechanismOfAction: Being oil-soluble, it penetrates lipid layers to dissolve sebum and dead skin cells inside pores.

seo.title: Salicylic Acid - Clinical Profile & Compatibility | Dew Theory
seo.description: Discover the scientific benefits, compatibility, and clinical profile of Salicylic Acid in skincare.
